canonical_credit_proxy_fg.name: market for aluminium, primary, ingot (CANONICAL FG credit proxy; upstream providers QC-swapped)

effective_stageD_provider_fg.name: market for aluminium, primary, ingot (CANONICAL FG credit proxy; upstream providers QC-swapped)

rw_landfill_net_fg.name: Route wrapper NET: Aluminium landfill (C3–C4 only; no Stage D), CA

rw_recycling_c3c4_fg.name: Route wrapper: Aluminium recycling (C3–C4), CA — refiner burdens-only

rw_recycling_net_fg.name: Route wrapper NET: Aluminium recycling post-consumer (NET)

rw_reuse_c3_fg.name: Route wrapper: Aluminium reuse (C3), CA — degreasing scaled by rho/t

rw_reuse_net_fg.name: Route wrapper NET: Aluminium reuse (C3) + Stage D, CA

sd_recycling_postcons_fg.name: Stage D credit (recycling, post-consumer): avoid canonical ingot provider × recovered yield

sd_reuse_combined_fg.name: Stage D credit (reuse): avoid canonical primary ingot (QC) + avoid extrusion (CA)

up_avoided_extrusion_fg.name: Avoided product proxy (Stage D): impact extrusion (CA marginal electricity)

up_avoided_ingot_fg.name: Avoided product proxy (Stage D): primary aluminium ingot (QC marginal electricity) [LEGACY - prefer canonical AL_credit_primary_ingot_IAI_NA_QC_elec]

up_degrease_fg.name: Reuse treatment unit process: degreasing (CA-regionalized)

up_landfill_fg.name: Aluminium EoL unit process: sanitary landfill (CA-regionalized)

up_refiner_postcons_fg.name: Recycling unit process: post-consumer refiner (CA-regionalized) [BASE]
up_refiner_postcons_fg.ref_product: aluminium scrap, post-consumer, prepared for melting

up_refiner_postcons_no_credit_fg.name: Recycling unit process: post-consumer refiner (CA-regionalized) [BASE] [NO embedded credit; burdens-only for decomposition]
